title: AvgSpeedClear Statement
parameters:
j1
		 - j9	Integer
		 expression representing the joint number.  If no parameters
		 are supplied, then the average values for all joints are cleared.

The
		 additional S axis is 8 and T axis is 9.  If non-existent
		 joint number is supplied, an error occurs.
description:
AvgSpeedClear clears the average of the absolute speed values for the specified joints.

You must execute AvgSpeedClear before executing AvgSpeed.

This command does not support the PG additional axes.
see_also:
Clears and initializes the average of the absolute speed values for one or more joints.

AvgSpeed

PeakSpeed
